---
description: "Workshop-specific editing instructions for the APM Security Scan Workshop"
applyTo: "labs/**/*.md"
---

## Lab Content Standards

- Every lab MUST have YAML frontmatter with `permalink`, `title`, and `description`
- Every lab MUST start with a French language switcher: `> 🇫🇷 **[Version française](/fr/labs/lab-XX-...)**`
- Every lab MUST have: Learning Objectives, Exercises, Verification Checkpoint, Next Steps
- All code blocks MUST have language identifiers (powershell, bash, yaml, json, etc.)
- Screenshots MUST use relative paths: `../images/lab-XX/filename.png`
